feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 咨询S4 Cloud ERP并行线系统是否支持增加自定义字段和自定义逻辑
entry.content:
咨询 S4 Public Cloud ERP 并行线系统 是否支持增加自定义字段和自定义逻辑，如是，会否影响已经上线的公司？

伙伴计划在其他公司代码下，在并行线里做配置。

目前如下两个界面做不了单独的自定义，盼指点原因，感谢。

entry.title: Details on Billing Plan Capabilities (Future Release)
entry.content:
Question on Road Map Explorer details:

Can you confirm the actual dates and timeline on when below updates will be implemented? We have recurring issues concerning billing plan and downpayments, and we think the release below will be able to sort out some of the issues.

SAP Road Map Explorer

Can you share some details on when will this be available for use and what changes to expect?

entry.title: Consume business partner api in sap
entry.content: Can anyone help me to consume standard API for business partner in public cloud to update the business partner

entry.title: How to configure the app Monitor Material Coverage to enable the line chart view
entry.content: How to configure the app Monitor Material Coverage to enable the line chart view

entry.title: Identifying Criteria for Cash Management Users
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Verily is trying to determine the number of users currently assigned a business category associated with Cash Management (License).

Based on our reporting, Verily has 10 users among these roles.

We also validated against the following based on KB/Joule:

  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAA_APPROVE_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAA_SUBMIT_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAL_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAM2_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAR_MANAGE_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAR_REVIEW_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BFM_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_CASH_OPS_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_CASH_SAC_OPS_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_CONF_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_POA_AUDIT_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_POA_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_SNAPSHOT_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAA_SUBMIT_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAA_APPROVE_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAL_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAM2_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BFM_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_POA_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_BAM_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_CASH_OPS_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_CONF_PC
  • SAP_FIN_BC_CM_SNAPSHOT_PC 
  •  

No additional user can be identifed. SAP Sales has identified 16 users (6 over our entitlement) for cash management roles per the internal dashboard. 

We also did not find any additional users following: Could SAP support help us identify the criteria that determine the 16 users identified by SAP Sales?

Thank you,

Verily IT


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there any way to get the value of material master data's proportion/prod. unit view's field ？
entry.content:
Hi experts

I want to perform a program check to see if the batch specific-units are maintained correctly, and I need to get values like Leading batch-specific unit of measure and Valuation based on the batch-specific unit of measure. In OP, the MARM table has the corresponding fields. But in the public cloud's I_PRODUCTUNITSOFMEASURE or other CDS, these fields don't exist. 

 

 

 

Do you have any suggestions?

Best Regards

entry.title: Order To cash Dashboard Profit Center filter not available
entry.content: Not able to filter based on Profit Centre in Order To Cash Dashboard. Also the data follows Calendar Year instead of Fiscal year. in the Order to Cash Dashboard in Public Cloud.

entry.title: Inspection lot sample size calculation based on manually entered carton quantity
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related to QM sampling.

At goods receipt, users manually enter the actual carton quantity. For example:

  • GR quantity: 1000 PCS
  • Actual cartons: 9 CTN (stored as batch characteristic or custom field)

In the inspection plan, we have an inspection characteristic for outer carton inspection. The expectation is that the sample size should be calculated based on the carton quantity (e.g. 9 CTN), not the inspection lot quantity (1000 PCS).

However, standard sampling seems to always use the inspection lot quantity, and alternative units require a fixed conversion, which we do not have (carton quantity varies per GR).

We would like to confirm:

  1. Is it possible in standard S/4HANA Cloud to calculate sample size based on a manually entered carton quantity?
  2. Can sampling be driven by batch characteristics or custom fields?
  3. If not, is this a standard limitation?
  4. Are there any recommended approaches (e.g. physical samples, sample-drawing procedures, etc.)?

Expected result: sample size for carton inspection is based on 9 CTN instead of 1000 PCS.

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: Can we send the current user email address in a SAP FIELD parameter in the outbound OCI interface?
entry.content: We are using the Fiori app Settings for Web Services (F1994) to define a punch out catalogue to Amazon Business.  Amazon Business require the email address of the user punching out to the catalogue. Is the user email address available in the list of SAP Field parameters in the call structure? If not, is there a BADI to add this in?

entry.title: Payment Reference field to be display in Approve Bank Payments App
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

 

May we ask if its possible to include "Payment Reference" field in Apprve Bank Payments app?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Engineering Change Management (ECM) Workflow for BOM Approval and Mass BO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and are evaluating the standard Engineering Change Management (ECM) process for Bill of Material (BOM) changes.

Our customer has the following business requirement, and we would like to understand the best practice in SAP Public Cloud.

Current Business Requirement

  • Any change to a BOM should go through only one approver.
  • The approver should be able to review the actual BOM changes (for example, component replacement, quantity change, addition/deletion of components) before approving.
  • Once approved, the changes should become effective on the defined effective date.

Additionally, the customer frequently performs mass BOM changes (similar to transaction CS20 in SAP ECC/On-Premise), where a single component is replaced or updated across multiple BOMs.

Observation in Standard Change Record Process

While testing the standard Change Record process in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (Discrete Industry Change), we observed the following workflow:

  1. Create Change Record.
  2. Submit Change Request.
  3. Approval.
  4. Start Implementation.
  5. Change Number is generated.
  6. Implement BOM changes.
  7. Close Implementation.

Based on this flow, it appears that the Change Number is generated only after the approval and Start Implementation step.

This means the engineer cannot modify the BOM under the Change Number before the approver has approved the request.

Our Questions

  1. Is this the standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  2. If yes, does the approver only approve the engineering request rather than the actual BOM modifications?
  3. Is there any standard process that allows the approver to review the proposed BOM changes before approval?
  4. Is it possible to configure the workflow so that:
    • the Change Number is available before approval,
    • the engineer prepares the BOM changes,
    • and the approver reviews the modified BOM before approving and releasing it?
  5. If this is not supported in the standard Public Cloud process, what is the SAP-recommended approach for customers who require approval of the actual engineering changes rather than only the request?

Mass BOM Changes

The customer also performs mass BOM changes similar to CS20 in SAP ECC.

We understand that CS20 is not available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Our questions are:

  1. What is the SAP-recommended approach for mass BOM updates in Public Cloud?
  2. Should the process be:
    • Create Change Record
    • Approval
    • Execute Mass Maintenance
    • Release
  3. Or is there another recommended workflow that maintains engineering traceability and approval?
  4. Which standard Fiori apps should be used together with ECM for controlled mass BOM changes?

We would appreciate guidance on the SAP best practice for implementing this requirement while staying as close as possible to the standard Public Cloud functionality.

entry.title: How to receive & pick full and partial boxes in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Business has requirement to receive and pick full and partial carton boxes. How can we configure in sap public cloud?

Is any solution available?

entry.title: How to set up free of charge purchase item in public cloud
entry.content:
It is possible to tick the box Free of charge in the purchase order to order a free of charge item. I have a requirement of my customer to always purchase free of charge item. 

What is the suggested solution here?

I tried the following:
1. Add an info record with 0, but I get the error: 
Net price must be greater than 0 Row: Condition Type: PPR0  

2. Implement BADI Change of Purchase Requisition Item:
IF purchaserequisitionitem-material = 'XXX.
PURCHASEREQUISITIONITEMCHANGE-INVOICEISEXPECTED = ''.

But unfortunately, this does set the flag in the purchase requisition

entry.title: GR Label Printing Based on “Number of Labels” Field
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Currently, the GR label printing process generates labels based on the received quantity. For example, if a line item has a quantity of 100, the system automatically prints 100 labels.

The client would like to change this behavior so that the number of labels printed is determined by the “Number of Labels” field entered by the user, rather than the received quantity.

Example:

  • Quantity = 100
  • Number of Labels = 2

Expected Result:

  • The system should print 2 labels only, based on the value entered in the “Number of Labels” field.

In summary, the label printing logic should be controlled by the “Number of Labels” field, enabling users to specify exactly how many labels need to be printed for each GR line item.

Please advise on the feasibility of implementing this requirement and the recommended approach.

Thanks & Regards,
Kiran

entry.title: Check number is not updating in Assignment filed of Gl line items
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing a challenge while reconciling the bank with the General Ledger (GL). The check number is not being updated in the Assignment field of the GL line item, which is making the reconciliation process difficult.

I could not find any relevant SAP Notes or documentation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud that explains how to populate the check number in the Assignment field.

Could you please let us know if there is a standard way to achieve this or if any configuration or enhancement is required?

Thank you for your support.

Regards,

Inthiyaz Shaik

entry.title: Incorrect VAT reporting date transferred from SD to FI in Public Cloud
entry.content:
We are experiencing issues with the derivation of the Tax Reporting Date in accounting documents generated from SD billing documents in the Hungarian localization of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.

According to the SAP documentation, the Tax Reporting Date and Tax Fulfilment Date can be derived via the configuration activity Define Derivation Rules for Business Transactions.

We found several scenarios in which the standard logic seems to produce incorrect dates.

1. Cancellation invoice

The derivation rule for normal invoices (OINV) is configured to use the fulfilment date for both tax dates. A normal invoice is created with a service rendered date of 30 June and cancelled on 7 July.

The generated FI document receives a Tax Reporting Date of 30 June, while according to Hungarian legislation we would expect the cancellation posting date (7 July).

Invoice date problem.docx

2. Collective invoice

For collective invoices, Hungarian regulations require both the Tax Reporting Date and the Tax Fulfilment Date to be derived from the latest fulfilment date among the referenced deliveries.

However, our debugging indicates that the fulfilment date is determined by class CL_FULFILLDATE_SERVICE, while the VAT date is determined by BAdI implementation CL_IM_IM_FULFILLMENT_ACC. In our tests, one date is taken from the first invoice item and the other from the last invoice item.

Invoice date problem.docx

3. Final invoice with down payment

For a final invoice containing a down-payment clearing item, the system seems to use the derivation rule maintained for OPERIO, although the business process is not a periodic settlement.

In our example, the final invoice receives:

  • Tax Reporting Date: 30.06.2026
  • Tax Fulfilment Date: 08.09.2026

while both dates should be 10.07.2026 according to our understanding of Hungarian VAT rules.

Invoice date problem.docx

Questions

  • Has anyone encountered similar behavior in the Hungarian localization of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  • Is this the intended standard behavior, or is it considered a defect?
  • Are there SAP Notes or recommended configuration settings that address these scenarios?
  • Is there any official guidance regarding the legal interpretation of these invoice types in Hungary?

entry.title: API_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01
entry.content: Hello,In S/4HANA Public Cloud, I need to retrieve Material Planning data and consume it in a custom BTP application intended for deployment in the public cloud.While researching the available options, I identified the following API as the appropriate one for this use case:Plain TextAPI_MRP_MATERIALS_SRV_01I was able to successfully retrieve the data using Postman. However, when I added this service to the manifest.json file of the BTP app project and attempted to deploy the app, I encountered an error stating that the usage of this service is forbidden in this context.Based on my investigation, the issue appears to be that this service is configured as an inbound service, whereas my intended use case requires it to be configured as outbound.Could you please advise on the following:Is there a way to resolve this error and correctly enable outbound usage of this service?Alternatively, is there a released Data Definition (e.g., a CDS view or equivalent API) that exposes the same Material Planning data and supports outbound consumption?Thank you in advance for your help.Best regards,

entry.title: Commodity Code values not displayed in CDS view I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01
entry.content: The commodity code values from purchase orders are not displayed in CDS view I_PURCHASEORDERITEMAPI01.

entry.title: Successor of Run Balance Interest Calculation (T-Code F.52) for G/L in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
entry.content:
We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and require clarification regarding Balance Interest Calculation for G/L Accounts.

In SAP S/4HANA Private Edition / On-Premise, transaction F.52 (Balance Interest Calculation) was available to calculate interest on G/L account balances, which was commonly used for calculating Running Finance / Running Markup on financing accounts.

We would like to ask the following:

  1. What is the standard alternative to Transaction F.52 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. Has this functionality been replaced by another Fiori application, background job, or standard process?
  3. If there is no direct replacement, what is the SAP-recommended approach for calculating Running Finance (interest/markup on G/L balances) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  4. Does SAP recommend using any standard functionality from Treasury, Bank Account Interest Management, or another component for this business requirement?
  5. If this functionality is not available in the standard Public Cloud solution, is there any recommended extensibility approach or best practice that SAP suggests?

Our business requirement is to calculate periodic financing charges (running finance/markup) based on the outstanding balance of a G/L account.

We would appreciate your guidance on the recommended standard solution and SAP best practices for this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thank you for your support.

Kind regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 如何通过加密厂商北京前沿信安科技股份有限公司的前置Proxy登陆S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: 咨询如何通过加密厂商 北京前沿信安科技股份有限公司 的前置Proxy登陆S4 Public Cloud，希望了解相关流程和注意事项，以及相关成功案例，非常感谢。
